stemHtml: A jet transport aircraft flying at its cruising level starts a climb from FL350 to FL370. The climb to the new level is performed at a constant Mach number. What is the effect of the change in level on the buffet margin?

options.a: The buffet margin will be larger, and buffet will occur at a lower load factor.
options.b: There will be NO effect on the buffet margin, and buffet will occur at the same load factor.
options.c: The buffet margin will be smaller and the buffet will occur at a lower load factor.
options.d: The buffet margin will be larger and buffet will occur at a higher load factor.
